injuries.comment: Jets' head coach Scott Arniel said on Wednesday (Oct. 22) that Barron is considered day-to-day due to an undisclosed injury, per Mitchell Clinton of the team's official site.
The Kraken said that Marchment will be a game-time decision for Thursday's (Oct. 23) game against the Jets.
McCann did not play in Tuesday's (Oct. 21) game against Washington.
